testcase.failure: tests/test_checkout.py:84: in test_checkout_total_calculation subtotal = self.checkout_page.get_subtotal_value() pages/checkout_page.py:98: in get_subtotal_value text = self.get_subtotal() # e.g. "Item total: $29.99" pages/checkout_page.py:86: in get_subtotal return self.get_text(self.SUBTOTAL_LABEL) pages/base_page.py:87: in get_text return self.find_visible_element(locator).text pages/base_page.py:67: in find_visible_element return self.wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located(locator)) .venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/support/wait.py:138: in until raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E 0 chromedriver 0x0000000103021ebc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3213376 E 1 chromedriver 0x0000000103019e8c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3180560 E 2 chromedriver 0x0000000102adf8d4 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75096 E 3 chromedriver 0x0000000102b278b4 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 369976 E 4 chromedriver 0x0000000102b6784c _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 632016 E 5 chromedriver 0x0000000102b1d27c _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 327424 E 6 chromedriver 0x0000000102fdff60 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2943204 E 7 chromedriver 0x0000000102fe3744 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2957512 E 8 chromedriver 0x0000000102fc4e50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2832340 E 9 chromedriver 0x0000000102fe3fc4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2959688 E 10 chromedriver 0x0000000102fb5828 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2769324 E 11 chromedriver 0x0000000103008920 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3109540 E 12 chromedriver 0x0000000103008a9c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3109920 E 13 chromedriver 0x0000000103019ae4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3179624 E 14 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x000000018fd5fc58 _pthread_start + 136 E 15 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x000000018fd5ac1c thread_start + 8

testcase.name: test_problem_user_checkout_info

failure.message:
AssertionError: BUG: First name is 'e' instead of 'John' assert 'e' == 'John'
- John + e

testcase.failure: tests/test_checkout.py:130: in test_problem_user_checkout_info assert fn == "John", f"BUG: First name is '{fn}' instead of 'John'" E AssertionError: BUG: First name is 'e' instead of 'John' E assert 'e' == 'John' E E - John E + e

testcase.name: test_problem_user_sort_name_za

failure.message:
AssertionError: BUG: Products not sorted Z-A for problem_user. Got: ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)'] assert ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)'] == ['Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Backpack']
At index 0 diff: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' != 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)'
Full diff: [ + 'Sauce Labs Backpack', + 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', + 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', + 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', + 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', - 'Sauce Labs Onesie', - 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', - 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', - 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', - 'Sauce Labs Backpack', ]

testcase.failure: tests/test_product.py:172: in test_problem_user_sort_name_za assert names == sorted(names, reverse=True), ( E AssertionError: BUG: Products not sorted Z-A for problem_user. Got: ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)'] E assert ['Sauce Labs Backpack', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)'] == ['Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', 'Sauce Labs Onesie', 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', 'Sauce Labs Backpack'] E E At index 0 diff: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' != 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)' E E Full diff: E [ E + 'Sauce Labs Backpack', E + 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', E + 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', E + 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', E + 'Sauce Labs Onesie', E 'Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red)', E - 'Sauce Labs Onesie', E - 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket', E - 'Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt', E - 'Sauce Labs Bike Light', E - 'Sauce Labs Backpack', E ]

testcase.name: test_problem_user_sort_price_lohi
testcase.failure: tests/test_product.py:182: in test_problem_user_sort_price_lohi assert prices == sorted(prices), ( E AssertionError: BUG: Prices not sorted low-to-high for problem_user. Got: [29.99, 9.99, 15.99, 49.99, 7.99, 15.99] E assert [29.99, 9.99, 15.99, 49.99, 7.99, 15.99] == [7.99, 9.99, 15.99, 15.99, 29.99, 49.99] E E At index 0 diff: 29.99 != 7.99 E E Full diff: E [ E - 7.99, E ? ^ E + 29.99, E ? ^^ E 9.99, E 15.99, E + 49.99, E + 7.99, E 15.99, E - 29.99, E - 49.99, E ]

testcase.name: test_problem_user_sort_price_hilo
testcase.failure: tests/test_product.py:192: in test_problem_user_sort_price_hilo assert prices == sorted(prices, reverse=True), ( E AssertionError: BUG: Prices not sorted high-to-low for problem_user. Got: [29.99, 9.99, 15.99, 49.99, 7.99, 15.99] E assert [29.99, 9.99, 15.99, 49.99, 7.99, 15.99] == [49.99, 29.99, 15.99, 15.99, 9.99, 7.99] E E At index 0 diff: 29.99 != 49.99 E E Full diff: E [ E + 29.99, E + 9.99, E + 15.99, E 49.99, E - 29.99, E ? ^^ E + 7.99, E ? ^ E 15.99, E - 15.99, E - 9.99, E - 7.99, E ]

testcase.name: test_error_user_sort_name_za

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.UnexpectedAlertPresentException: Alert Text: Sorting is broken! This error has been reported to Backtrace. Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Sorting is broken! This error has been reported to Backtrace.} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x0000000100f6debc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3213376 1 chromedriver 0x0000000100f65e8c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3180560 2 chromedriver 0x0000000100a2b8d4 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75096 3 chromedriver 0x0000000100ab3fe8 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 633964 4 chromedriver 0x0000000100a6927c _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 327424 5 chromedriver 0x0000000100f2bf60 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2943204 6 chromedriver 0x0000000100f2f744 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2957512 7 chromedriver 0x0000000100f10e50 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2832340 8 chromedriver 0x0000000100f2ffc4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2959688 9 chromedriver 0x0000000100f01828 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2769324 10 chromedriver 0x0000000100f54920 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3109540 11 chromedriver 0x0000000100f54a9c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3109920 12 chromedriver 0x0000000100f65ae4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3179624 13 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x000000018fd5fc58 _pthread_start + 136 14 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x000000018fd5ac1c thread_start + 8
